debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω => ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun x => @Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n)
    (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)

failed_attempts:
have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [arrayMeasure] using
      (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
        (φ := fun x : ℕ → I ↦ x (n + 1)) (ψ := id) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact h.comp_right (g := fun h ↦ hist alg h n) (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n))

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_snd_prod
      (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))
      (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))
      (measurePreserving_eval_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (n + 1)).indepFun
      (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).comp measurable_id (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n))

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (φ := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (ψ := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ hist alg ω n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

have h_prod : IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ ω)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
  exact h_prod.comp measurable_id ((measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n)).snd)

have h_ind :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp (φ := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (by fun_prop)
      (ψ := id) (by fun_prop)
  refine h_ind.comp_right (g := hist alg · n) ?_
  exact measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n

classical
  -- `ω.1 (n+1)` depends only on the first coordinate, while `hist alg · n` depends only on finitely
  -- many coordinates of the first coordinate (≤ n) and the whole second coordinate. Use independence
  -- of product coordinates and the fact that coordinates in `ℕ → I` are independent.
  have h_indep_fst_snd : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν
  have h_indep_coords : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (fun ω ↦ (fun k : Iic n ↦ ω.1 k)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    -- reduce to independence inside the first marginal measure
    have h_indep_pi :
        IndepFun (fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1)) (fun u : ℕ → I ↦ (fun k : Iic n ↦ u k))
          (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) := by
      -- use `iIndepFun` of coordinates of `infinitePi`
      have h_i :
          iIndepFun (fun i u : (ℕ → I) ↦ u i)
            (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) :=
        iIndepFun_infinitePi (P := fun (_ : ℕ) ↦ (volume : Measure I)) (Ω := fun _ ↦ I)
          (X := fun i u ↦ u) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
      -- apply independence between the singleton `{n+1}` and the finite set `Iic n`
      have h_indep_single :
          IndepFun (fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1)) (fun u : ℕ → I ↦ (fun k : Iic n ↦ u k))
            (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) := by
        -- extract independence by `iIndepFun` using disjointness
        refine (h_i.indepFun ?_) 
        intro i hi
        -- `i` ranges over `Iic n`, hence `i.1 ≤ n`, so cannot be `n+1`
        exact Nat.ne_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt i.2 (Nat.lt_succ_self n))
      exact h_indep_single
    -- lift to the product measure by composing with `Prod.fst`
    have h_indep_pi' :
        IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
          (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (fun k : Iic n ↦ ω.1 k))
          ((Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I)).prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)) := by
      simpa [arrayMeasure] using
        (indepFun_fst_prod_of_indepFun (μ := Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I))
          (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
          (X := fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1))
          (Y := fun u : ℕ → I ↦ (fun k : Iic n ↦ u k)) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) h_indep_pi)
    simpa [arrayMeasure] using h_indep_pi'
  -- now `hist alg · n` is measurable w.r.t. the sigma-algebra generated by the second coordinate
  -- and the first coordinates up to `n`; hence independent from `ω.1 (n+1)`.
  have h_meas_hist :
      Measurable (hist alg · n) := by
    simpa using (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (R := R) n)
  -- combine independence: `ω.1(n+1)` is independent from `(ω.1|_{≤n}, ω.2)`, and `hist` is a
  -- measurable function of `(ω.1|_{≤n}, ω.2)`.
  have h_indep_pair :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
        (fun ω ↦ ((fun k : Iic n ↦ ω.1 k), ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    -- independence from the first coordinates ≤ n and from the entire second coordinate, jointly
    refine (h_indep_coords.prod_mk_right ?_)
    -- `ω.1 (n+1)` depends only on `ω.1`, independent from `ω.2`
    have : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
      (h_indep_fst_snd.comp_left (φ := fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1)) (by fun_prop))
    simpa using this
  -- `hist` factors through that pair, so conclude by composition
  refine h_indep_pair.comp_right (g := fun p : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦
      hist alg ( (fun m ↦ (fun k : Iic n ↦ p.1 k) (by
        intro k
        exact p.1 k), p.2) ) n) ?_ ?_
  · exact h_meas_hist
  · fun_prop

refine (indepFun_fst_snd (ν := ν)).comp
    (φ := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
    (ψ := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ hist alg ω n) ?_ ?_
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop

classical
  -- `hist alg · n` is measurable w.r.t. the σ-algebra generated by the first `n+1` coordinates
  -- of `ω.1` and the whole second component `ω.2`; the coordinate `ω.1 (n+1)` is independent
  -- from those under the product measure.
  have h_ind :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
        (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (ω.1, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    simpa using
      (indepFun_prod
        (X := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1))
        (Y := fun ω : ℕ → I × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
          (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω) (arrayMeasure ν))
  refine h_ind.comp measurable_id ?_
  have h_meas : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ hist alg ω n) := by
    simpa using (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (R := R) n)
  exact h_meas

classical
  simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (φ := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (ψ := fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ hist alg (ω, ·) n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  -- `ω.1 (n+1)` depends only on the first coordinate; `hist alg · n` depends only on finitely many
  -- coordinates of the first component and finitely many coordinates of the second component,
  -- but not on `ω.1 (n+1)`; use independence of coordinates in the product measure.
  -- We prove this by induction on `n`.
  induction n with
  | zero =>
    -- `hist alg ω 0` depends only on `ω.1 0` and `ω.2 0 _`, independent of `ω.1 1`.
    have h₁ : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (0 + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.1 0) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      simpa using
        (indepFun_eval_infinitePi (μ := fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) (i := 1) (j := 0)
          (by simp))
    have h₂ :
        IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (0 + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2 0 (initAlgFunction alg (ω.1 0)))
          (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      have hfst_snd : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (0 + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2)
          (arrayMeasure ν) := by
        -- independence of first and second projections, then compose
        have : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν
        simpa [Prod.fst, Prod.snd] using this.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) measurable_id (by fun_prop)
      -- function factors through `ω.2` (snd), so compose
      exact hfst_snd.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) measurable_id (by fun_prop)
    -- now combine: `hist 0` is a measurable function of `(ω.1 0, ω.2 0 (initAlgFunction alg (ω.1 0)))`
    -- and both are independent of `ω.1 1`
    have h :
        IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 1)
          (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 0, ω.2 0 (initAlgFunction alg (ω.1 0)))) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      -- build independence into a pair
      simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using (h₁.prod_mk h₂)
    -- finish by composing with the measurable map producing `hist alg · 0`
    have hmeas :
        Measurable (fun p : I × R ↦ (initAlgFunction alg p.1, p.2)) := by fun_prop
    -- `hist alg ω 0` is exactly that composed with the pair-map above
    simpa [hist_zero, Function.comp] using h.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) hmeas
  | succ n ih =>
    -- use the decomposition `hist (n+1)` as an `IicSuccProd` of `hist n` and the next pair,
    -- and independence of `ω.1 (n+2)` from everything built from earlier coordinates.
    -- First, `ω.1 (n+2)` is independent of `hist n` by `ih` and of `ω.2 _ _` by product structure.
    have hfst_hist : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1 + 1)) (hist alg · n)
        (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using (ih (n := n))
    have hfst_snd' :
        IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1 + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      have : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν
      simpa [Prod.fst, Prod.snd] using
        this.comp (X' := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1 + 1)) (Y' := fun ω ↦ ω.2)
          (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) measurable_id measurable_id
    have hfst_algAction :
        IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1 + 1))
          (fun ω ↦ algFunction alg n (hist alg ω n) (ω.1 (n + 1))) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      -- the RHS depends only on `ω.1 (n+1)` and `hist n`; use that `ω.1 (n+2)` is independent
      -- from the whole first coordinate except at index `n+2`.
      have h₁ :
          IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1 + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
            (arrayMeasure ν) := by
        -- independence of distinct coordinates in the first component, then lift through product
        have hcoord :
            IndepFun (fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 2)) (fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1))
              (Measure.infinitePi fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) := by
          simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using
            (indepFun_eval_infinitePi (μ := fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) (i := n + 2) (j := n + 1)
              (by
                have : n + 2 ≠ n + 1 := by omega
                exact this))
        -- lift to product measure: both depend only on `fst`
        have hlift :
            IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2)) (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
              (arrayMeasure ν) := by
          -- `arrayMeasure ν` is a product; use `IndepFun` on `fst` by mapping
          simpa [arrayMeasure, Measure.fst_prod] using
            (hcoord.comp (φ := Prod.fst) (ψ := Prod.fst) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
        simpa [Nat.add_assoc] using hlift
      -- combine independence from `hist n` and from `ω.1 (n+1)` into independence from the pair,
      -- then compose.
      have hpair :
          IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
            (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
        simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using (h₁.prod_mk hfst_hist)
      -- measurable map from the pair to the action
      have hmeas :
          Measurable (fun p : I × (Iic n → α × R) ↦ algFunction alg n p.2 p.1) := by
        -- `Function.uncurry` measurability of `algFunction`
        simpa [Function.uncurry] using (measurable_algFunction (alg := alg) (n := n))
      -- rewrite and conclude
      simpa [action_add_one_eq, Function.comp, Nat.add_assoc] using hpair.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) hmeas
    -- Now build `hist (n+1)` from `(hist n, (action n+1, reward n+1))` and use independence of
    -- `ω.1 (n+2)` from that pair.
    have hfst_pair :
        IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
          (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, (action alg (n + 1) ω, reward alg (n + 1) ω)))
          (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      -- `reward` depends only on `ω.2` and earlier `ω.1`; combine as a triple
      have hfst_reward :
          IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2)) (fun ω ↦ reward alg (n + 1) ω)
            (arrayMeasure ν) := by
        -- reward factors through `ω.2` and `action`/`hist`, and `ω.1 (n+2)` is independent of `ω.2`
        -- and of `hist`/`action` by previous steps.
        have hfst_histAction :
            IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
              (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
          simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using (hfst_hist.prod_mk hfst_algAction)
        -- reward is a measurable function of `(ω.2, hist n, action n+1)`
        have hfst_snd_histAction :
            IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
              (fun ω ↦ (ω.2, (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
          simpa [Prod.mk.eta, Prod.assoc] using (hfst_snd'.prod_mk hfst_histAction)
        have hmeas :
            Measurable (fun q : (ℕ → α → R) × ((Iic n → α × R) × α) ↦
              q.1 (pullCount' n q.2.1 q.2.2) q.2.2) := by
          have : Measurable
              (fun q : ((ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α) ↦ q.1 q.2.1 q.2.2) :=
            measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)
          -- build from measurable components
          have hpc : Measurable (fun q : (ℕ → α → R) × ((Iic n → α × R) × α) ↦
              pullCount' n q.2.1 q.2.2) := by
            have : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦
                pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω)) := by
              have h_hist : Measurable (hist alg · n) := measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n)
              simpa [action_add_one_eq] using measurable_pullCount'_action_add_one (alg := alg) n h_hist
            -- transfer measurability through the pair (as used below via `comp`)
            simpa using this
          -- direct `fun_prop` can't see the composed structure cleanly; use `comp` with pairing
          refine this.comp ?_
          refine (Measurable.prodMk measurable_fst ?_)
          refine Measurable.prodMk ?_ (by fun_prop)
          exact hpc
        -- conclude using `reward_add_one`
        simpa [reward_add_one, Function.comp, Nat.add_assoc] using
          hfst_snd_histAction.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) hmeas
      -- combine into final pair
      have hfst_hist' : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
          (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
        simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using (hfst_hist.prod_mk hfst_algAction)
      have hfst_hist_action_reward :
          IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
            (fun ω ↦ ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω), reward alg (n + 1) ω))
            (arrayMeasure ν) := by
        simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using (hfst_hist' .prod_mk hfst_reward)
      simpa [Prod.mk.eta, Prod.assoc] using hfst_hist_action_reward
    -- final compose with `IicSuccProd` equivalence
    have hmeas :
        Measurable (fun p : (Iic n → α × R) × (α × R) ↦
          (MeasurableEquiv.IicSuccProd (fun _ ↦ α × R) n).symm p) := by
      fun_prop
    -- rewrite `hist (n+1)` and conclude
    simpa [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd, Nat.add_assoc] using
      (hfst_pair.comp (X' := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2))
        (Y' := fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, (action alg (n + 1) ω, reward alg (n + 1) ω)))
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) measurable_id hmeas)

have h_ind :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.2)
        (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [arrayMeasure] using
      (indepFun_prod
        (X := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ ω)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
  refine h_ind.comp_right (φ := fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ hist alg (ω := (Classical.choice inst✝⁶, ω)) n)
    ?_
  · fun_prop

classical
  -- `ω.1 (n+1)` depends only on the `fst` coordinate, while `hist alg · n` depends only on the
  -- finitely many `fst` coordinates `< n+1` and on `snd`; since `fst` is an i.i.d. product, the
  -- coordinate `n+1` is independent from the σ-field generated by the previous ones, and is also
  -- independent from `snd` (product measure).
  refine (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp_left ?_ (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i)) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
    -- independence of a fresh coordinate from the tuple of previous ones in an infinite product
    simpa using
      (iIndepFun_eval_infinitePi (μ := fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I))
        (X := fun i ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω i) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)).indepFun
        (by
          intro i hi
          have : (i : ℕ) ≠ n + 1 := by
            exact Nat.ne_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hi (Nat.le_succ n))
          exact this)
  -- now lift to the product with `snd` and compose with `hist`
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
        (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    -- both functions ignore `snd`, so this follows from the `fst` marginal
    have : (arrayMeasure ν).fst = Measure.infinitePi (fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) := by
      simp [arrayMeasure]
    -- use `IndepFun` under `fst` and pull back along `Prod.fst`
    refine (h_indep.comp (φ := Prod.fst) (ψ := Prod.fst) ?_ ?_).mono_measure ?_
    · fun_prop
    · fun_prop
    · simpa [this]
  -- `hist alg · n` is measurable w.r.t. the σ-field generated by `(fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i)` and `snd`,
  -- hence independent of `ω.1 (n+1)`; we use the already-established product independence.
  refine h_indep_prod.comp_right (g := fun ω ↦ hist alg ω n) ?_
  · exact (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n)

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (φ := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (ψ := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ hist alg ω n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  -- `arrayMeasure ν` is a product measure; `ω.1 (n+1)` depends only on the first coordinate,
  -- `hist alg ω n` depends only on finitely many coordinates of `ω.1`, hence is independent.
  refine (indepFun_prod_left ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_).comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) ?_ measurable_id
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop
  ·
    -- independence in `Measure.infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume)` between one coordinate and the finite
    -- set of earlier coordinates used by `hist`.
    simpa using
      (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_finite (μ := fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I))
        (i := n + 1) (s := (Finset.range (n + 1))))
  · fun_prop
  ·
    -- `hist` depends only on the first coordinate of the product space.
    -- (the second coordinate is independent and ignored)
    simpa [hist] using (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n)

classical
  refine (indepFun_fst_snd (ν := ν)).comp (φ := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1))
    (ψ := fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ hist alg (⟨(fun _ ↦ (0 : I)), ω⟩ : probSpace α R) n)
    (by fun_prop) ?_
  · have h_meas : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ hist alg ω n) := measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n)
    simpa [Function.comp] using h_meas.comp (by fun_prop)

have h₁ :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    refine (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp ?_ ?_
    · fun_prop
    · fun_prop
  have h₂ :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    h₁
  exact h₂.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n)

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp
      (φ := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (ψ := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ hist alg ω n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

have h' : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)
  exact h'.comp_right (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) (alg := alg) (n := n))

classical
  -- `ω.1 (n+1)` is measurable w.r.t. the first factor, `hist alg · n` w.r.t. the second factor.
  refine (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp
    (φ := fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1))
    (ψ := fun v : ℕ → α → R ↦ hist alg (⟨fun k ↦ (0 : I), v⟩ : probSpace α R) n)
    (by fun_prop) ?_
  · -- measurability of `hist` as a function of the second coordinate
    have hmeas : Measurable (fun v : ℕ → α → R ↦ (⟨fun k ↦ (0 : I), v⟩ : probSpace α R)) := by
      refine Measurable.prod_mk ?_ measurable_id
      have : Measurable (fun _ : (ℕ → α → R) ↦ (fun _ : ℕ ↦ (0 : I))) := measurable_const
      simpa using this
    exact (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n).comp hmeas

have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp
      (φ := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (ψ := hist alg · n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact h.comp_right (φ := hist alg · n) (by fun_prop)

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (f := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (g := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ hist alg ω n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd
        ((Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)) := by
      simpa [arrayMeasure] using
        (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
          (φ := fun x : ℕ → I ↦ x (n + 1)) (ψ := id) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    simpa [arrayMeasure] using this
  exact h.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n))

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (φ := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (ψ := fun ω : (ℕ → α → R) ↦ hist alg (ω := ((0 : ℕ → I), ω)) n)
      (by fun_prop) (by
        have : Measurable (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.2) := by fun_prop
        exact (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n).comp this)

have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [arrayMeasure] using
      (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (mα := mα) (mR := mR) (ν := ν)).comp
        (φ := fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1)) (ψ := id) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact h.comp_right (g := fun x ↦ hist alg x n) (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n))

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (φ := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (ψ := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ hist alg ω n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν).comp (φ := fun x : ℕ → I ↦ x (n + 1)) (by fun_prop)
      measurable_id
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n))

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) (ν := ν)).comp
      (f := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (g := fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ hist alg ω n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_left (P := fun _ : ℕ ↦ volume)
        (Q := fun _ : ℕ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) (i := n + 1) (g := hist alg · n)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))

have hprod : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν
  simpa [arrayMeasure] using
    (hprod.comp (φ := fun u : ℕ → I ↦ u (n + 1)) (ψ := fun v : ℕ → α → R ↦ hist alg (u := (u, v)) n)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))

have h1 : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have hprod : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd (ν := ν)
    exact hprod.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) measurable_id (by fun_prop)
  have h2 : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Prod.fst (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have hprod : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd (ν := ν)
    have hsymm : IndepFun Prod.snd Prod.fst (arrayMeasure ν) := hprod.symm
    exact hsymm.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) measurable_id (by fun_prop)
  have hpair :
      IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (ω.1, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [IndepFun] using (h2.prod_mk h1)
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ hist alg ω n) := measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n)
  exact hpair.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop) measurable_id (by simpa using hmeas)

have h' : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.2)
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have h : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd (α := α) (R := R) ν
    simpa [arrayMeasure] using h.comp (φ := fun x : ℕ → I ↦ x (n + 1)) (ψ := fun x : ℕ → α → R ↦ x)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact h'.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist (α := α) (R := R) alg n)

have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.1) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have hcoord : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
      simpa using
        (iIndepFun_eval_infinitePi (μ := fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I))
          (X := fun i ω ↦ ω i) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)).indepFun (by
            intro i hi
            simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] using hi)
    have hprod :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
          (fun ω : (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) ↦ ω.1) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      refine indepFun_fst_prod_of_indepFun ?_ (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) ?_
      · fun_prop
      · fun_prop
      · simpa [arrayMeasure] using hcoord
    simpa [probSpace, Prod.fst, id] using hprod
  exact h.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist (alg := alg) (n := n))
